cooked: I got mine from the Paris Saint batch about a month ago for $100, works fine - no issues with mine, but didn’t come with the paper manual. When I saw these pop up I had to get one as a TE fan, and an ex-Kanye fan. Def an interesting piece of music culture / tech history. Looking forward to maybe seeing the firmware get cracked someday, but even if it doesn’t, it’s still pretty fun to play with and will always be interesting on a shelf haha.
